command: awk '/\| \*\*v1.11.0\*\*/ {print; print "| **v1.12.0** | ✅ Complete | Bun UB evidence-readiness and tokmd-swarm workbench. |\n| **v1.13.0** | ✅ Complete | Syntax-aware evidence packet surface. |\n| **v1.13.1** | ✅ Complete | Correction release for the syntax-aware evidence packet surface. |"; next} 1' ROADMAP.md > tmp_roadmap.md && mv tmp_roadmap.md ROADMAP.md
